holdings.infoBox: ESPO is an equity ETF with a total of 29 individual holdings. The top holdings are NetEase stock at 8.17%, Tencent Holdings at 7.20%, Electronic Arts at 7.02%, Unity Software at 6.54%, and Aristocrat Leisure at 6.24%.

overview.description: The VanEck Video Gaming and eSports ETF (ESPO) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the MVIS Global Video Gaming & eSports index, a market-cap-weighted index of global firms involved in video gaming and eSports. ESPO was launched on Oct 16, 2018 and is issued by VanEck.

data.title: VanEck Announces Year-End Distributions for VanEck Equity ETFs
data.text: NEW YORK--(BUSINESS WIRE)--VanEck announced today the 2025 annual distributions per share for its VanEck equity exchange-traded funds.

data.text: NEW YORK--(BUSINESS WIRE)--VanEck announced today the following 2022 annual distributions per share for its VanEck® equity exchange-traded funds.

data.title: Shift towards gaming is secular, not just cyclical: LightShed Partners' analyst
data.text: Consumer pending on video games reached $11.2B in Q3. Brandon Ross, LightShed Partners media and technology analyst, joins 'Power Lunch' to discuss the growing interest and the names to watch.
